questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #105 adds a read-only dscli validate_config operator preflight: the diff registers validate_config in cli/command.py, adds cli/validate_config.py to load a cluster config from -c/--config, accumulate structural problems for worker_nodes, worker_port, worker_config_path, and ssh_auth, and return success only for a valid config. The existing MM dscli and validation sections were incomplete without this flow.
